---
title: "ButterMilk & Bourbon: a Microbrewery Investment Case"
subtitle: "Analyzing the financial viability of investing in a microbrewery business"
format:
  html:
    theme: cosmo
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    smooth-scroll: true
    page-layout: full
---

<iframe src="visuals/Buttermilk&BourbonMicrobreweryProject_Group7 (2).pdf" width="100%" height="600px"></iframe>
<iframe src="visuals/AD715_ Team Term Project 1 (1).pdf" width="100%" height="600px"></iframe>
<iframe src="visuals/AD715_ Team Term Project 2 (2).pdf" width="100%" height="600px"></iframe>
